Ashwini.description: Very similar personalities. Passionate and confident love. Learn to curb independent nature to avoid clashes.

Bharani.description: Best partnership! Passionate, exciting and sexy. Bharani exudes sensual energy. They soothe your fears of rejection.

Krittika.description: Instant attraction but needs stoking with love. Krittika is shy and diffident. Chase them to keep interest.

Rohini.description: Sexy and sensuous. Karmic link for secret pleasures. Beware of Rohini's possessiveness and establish trust.

Mrigashirsha.description: Mrigasira stimulates you. Passionate and fiery love. Their possessiveness can make you uncomfortable.

Ardra.description: Appears to be soul mate but emotionally turbulent. Extreme emotions - from deliriously happy to disconsolate.

Punarvasu.description: Better as friends and adventure partners. You hate their constant advice on how to lead your life.

Pushya.description: Not instant attraction but grows with time. Excellent long-term relationship with deep foundations.

Ashlesha.description: Mystical and wise, keeps you interested. Problem is their possessiveness - they cannot tolerate your independence.

Magha.description: Unfinished karmic business. Many highs and lows. Both idealistic but can make each other unhappy.

Purva Phalguni.description: You love their exquisite taste and charm. They match your sensuality. Only issue: they don't understand your spiritual nature.

Uttara Phalguni.description: Cosmic relationship of Ketu and Sun is difficult. Distrust on both sides. Overcome it for a sublime relationship.

Hasta.description: Most difficult relationship. Hard to relate to their emotionalism. No sexual spark. Cannot appreciate their positive qualities.

Chitra.description: Never able to give full attention. Passion can be good but love may not stand test of time. Battlefield relationship.

Swati.description: Not sexy at first but mentally stimulating. Fulfill your other dreams. Pay attention to sexual intimacy.

Vishakha.description: Sensuous and passionate but lack of sensitivity. Restlessness undermines confidence. Commitment issues.

Anuradha.description: Appreciate their attractions given time. Passionate under cool exterior. Make them feel secure.

Jyeshta.description: Spiritually complex relationship. You know they can make you unhappy but unable to let go. Can hurt each other.

Mula.description: Lots in common - adventurous and fun. Share ruler Ketu. But spiritually you don't bond. Past becomes a demon.

Purva Ashadha.description: Charming, sexy, talented and creative. Passion is great, playful and sensual. Fun to be with.

Uttara Ashadha.description: Friendly but keeps emotional distance. You take this as challenge. Unconventional and special love possible.

Shravana.description: Serious workaholics with twinkle in eyes. Enjoy sex and are innovative lovers. Could easily fall in love.

Dhanishta.description: Fiery and combative love life. Both love sex but don't make it an issue of fights. Not possessive.

Shatabhisha.description: Good at sex, bad at intimacy. Past issues bother you. Unable to empathize with emotions or be open.

Purva Bhadrapada.description: Want to protect their dreaminess but soon desperate to escape. Passionate then distant. Arrogant lion underneath.

Uttara Bhadrapada.description: Can be friend, mate or colleague but never lover - until you discover hidden sensuality. Committed and steady love.

Revati.description: Feel intimate and emotional. Their love makes you feel strong. They understand you. Inspire protective instincts.

Ashwini.description: Your best relationship: dynamic, vital and adventurous. You can soothe their fears of rejection and lack of love.

Bharani.description: Similar natures bind you together: creative, caring, nurturing. Instinctively understanding partner's needs.

Krittika.description: Fascinates you. May need to seduce them into being exciting. Warm and loving but destructive if mocked.

Rohini.description: Can fulfill your need for sex and passion. Give them love, romance and fantasy. Possessive and may not let you go.

Mrigashirsha.description: Instant attraction, hot and fiery passion can propel you into an affair. The fire can burn out too quickly.

Ardra.description: You are able to understand the deeper needs of Ardra, their fears and insecurities. You find them witty and charming.

Punarvasu.description: Great potential. Let your Punarvasu lover know that you need a lover, not a guru. They have many admirers.

Pushya.description: Disciplined, practical and pragmatic, Pushya are what you really need. The balance of sensuality and passions.

Ashlesha.description: An unconventional relationship that works despite being based on different rules of engagement.

Magha.description: You are attracted to Magha's power and arrogance - and their unexpected sensitivity.

Purva Phalguni.description: Planet Venus rules both your Nakshatras. You enjoy a light flirtation but soon realise how similar you are.

Uttara Phalguni.description: Uttara Phalguni is keen to be helpful and will always be there for you. They can be boring but there are compensations.

Hasta.description: Hasta invites you into their homes and hearts. They will love you without accepting anything in return.

Chitra.description: A difficult partnership. Chitra is exotic, adventurous, and sensuous. This can lead to an exciting experience.

Swati.description: Swati are charmers. You love their verve, energy, and the interesting way they flirt with you.

Vishakha.description: The sexual excitement that brought you together cannot be sustained at the high note on which it started.

Anuradha.description: Anuradha is your spiritually complex relationship. Karmic issues from the past can intrude.

Jyeshta.description: You can be tied to Jyeshta's deeply sensual nature. They are mystical and intriguing.

Mula.description: You are attracted by their unconventional, daring lifestyle. You use all your wiles and sexual experience to get them interested.

Purva Ashadha.description: You connect to the Venusian qualities in each other. Your directions in life differ and this creates disagreements.

Uttara Ashadha.description: You are drawn to the cool asceticism of Uttara Ashadha. The relationship can only be fulfilling if you take the sensual lead.

Shravana.description: Great sexual attraction. Shravana's ability to pick up the vibrations of your senses and fulfill your every demand.

Dhanishta.description: You should think carefully before embarking on a relationship where your deeper sexual needs may not be met.

Shatabhisha.description: Shatabhishak can be your good friends, do not mistake friendship for love. You need warm, passionate partners.

Purva Bhadrapada.description: Who rules this relationship, the elephant or the lion? Sexually your worst partner but compatible in other areas.

Uttara Bhadrapada.description: Your worst relationship. Uttara Bhadra can be ascetic, rigid and cold. They may not express any of the warmth to you.

Revati.description: Revati is your perfect sexual partner. As you get to know of their inner purity and spirituality, this influences you.

Ashwini.description: Instant attraction but needs stoking with love. Krittika is shy and diffident. Chase them to keep interest.

Bharani.description: Fascinates you. May need to seduce them into being exciting. Warm and loving but destructive if mocked.

Krittika.description: Both shy and diffident. Takes time to express love. Good long-term potential but lacks initial spark.

Rohini.description: Warm but diffident Krittika hard to resist. Soon feel dominated. May seek other relationships making trust hard.

Mrigashirsha.description: Intellectual connection strong. Passion may be lacking. Need to work on emotional intimacy.

Ardra.description: Complex relationship with ups and downs. Emotional turbulence can be challenging.

Punarvasu.description: Good friendship base. Need to develop romantic connection. Shared values help.

Pushya.description: Stable and nurturing relationship. Both practical and caring. Good for long-term.

Ashlesha.description: Difficult dynamic. Power struggles and emotional manipulation possible.

Magha.description: Don't trust enough to share vulnerabilities. Playing 'who's stronger?' Both ignoring inner feelings covering insecurities.

Purva Phalguni.description: Venusian warmth helps open up. Fun and light relationship. Need deeper connection over time.

Uttara Phalguni.description: Excellent match. Both ruled by Sun. Strong, stable, and supportive. Share similar values.

Hasta.description: Moon and Sun balance. Emotional and practical. Good understanding between partners.

Chitra.description: Mars energy can clash. Passion present but conflicts arise. Need compromise.

Swati.description: Rahu influence creates uncertainty. Unconventional but challenging.

Vishakha.description: Jupiter brings wisdom but can be overwhelming. Need balance in relationship.

Anuradha.description: Powerful and dynamic, strong pull. Strong and silent type. Envelop you in warmth.

Jyeshta.description: Invigorated by warmth and straightforward approach. Strong so cannot manipulate. Feel secure and loved.

Mula.description: Ketu influence creates spiritual complexity. May lack practical grounding.

Purva Ashadha.description: Venusian qualities present. Creative but may lack discipline.

Uttara Ashadha.description: Sun rulers connect well. Strong, dignified relationship. Mutual respect and support.

Shravana.description: Lunar influence brings emotional depth. Good listener and supportive partner.

Dhanishta.description: Mars energy can create conflicts. Need to channel passion constructively.

Shatabhisha.description: Rahu creates complexity. Unconventional relationship with challenges.

Purva Bhadrapada.description: Jupiter influence brings growth. Can be overwhelming at times.

Uttara Bhadrapada.description: Saturn brings stability. Slow to develop but strong over time.

Revati.description: Mercury and Sun work well together. Good communication and understanding.

Ashwini.description: Exciting, fiery and passionate. Wild untameable quality. Both restless souls keep relationship fresh. Don't be too possessive.

Bharani.description: Exploration of sensuality. Be willing to be possessed. Journey of ecstasy. Beware of excesses in sexual and financial matters.

Krittika.description: Warm but diffident Krittika hard to resist. Soon feel dominated. May seek other relationships making trust hard.

Rohini.description: Too alike. Both look at life with rose-tinted glasses. Lack of practicality. Lack of trust, jealousy and possessiveness.

Mrigashirsha.description: Good friendship and exciting sex. Want same things. Introduce Mrigasira to sensuality. Emotionally complete.

Ardra.description: Moon fears Rahu but becomes delicious excitement. Practical responses to romance irritate. Avoid distrust.

Punarvasu.description: Enjoy their wisdom. Love playing sensual games. Both jealous and possessive, not hot on commitment.

Pushya.description: Don't look for superficial attraction. Can love you in ways few others can. Bring peace to restless mind.

Ashlesha.description: Mystical, secretive, manipulative. Power play and sensual games. Both venomous with sharp words. Emotional mess.

Magha.description: Worst relationship. You need romance, they want sex. Their rejection hard to deal with. Philandering makes you jealous.

Purva Phalguni.description: Will indulge your romantic dreams. Excellent foil - their practicality gives base to your emotions. Enjoy life together.

Uttara Phalguni.description: Love their strength - makes you feel secure. Not most imaginative but there for you. Beware of jealous temper.

Hasta.description: Enjoy their sophistication and earthiness. Both moody but understand this. Like their simple approach to life.

Chitra.description: Attracted to dynamic, confident, passionate Chitra. Let them dominate but discover implacability and selfishness.

Swati.description: Spiritually complex. Irrational mistrust. Moon frightened of Rahu. Fear interpreted as lack of trust.

Vishakha.description: Unable to understand inner needs. Happy as long as you play by their rules. Unrealistic expectations.

Anuradha.description: Aspire to divine love and self-realization through love. Passionate love brings out best in you. Remember to come back to earth.

Jyeshta.description: Love mystical charm and intellect. Satisfy need for luxury. May not be totally in tune spiritually but give freedom.

Mula.description: Tend to put responsibility of love on them. Ill-equipped to handle. Aspires to freedom. Can be hurtful and cruel.

Purva Ashadha.description: Fall for charm and creativity but may be falling for image. Realistic and develop friendship first. Need to be free.

Uttara Ashadha.description: Extreme jealousy and sexual rivalry. Mutual attraction compulsive but their coldness makes you lose faith.

Shravana.description: Know they are moody but become detached. Not there when you need them. Feel neglected and ignored.

Dhanishta.description: Happy to romance but no commitment. Suddenly austere when you show preference for luxury. Mixed signals.

Shatabhisha.description: Initially cold and unfeeling. Fall in love and they respond. Unique way of loving. Open emotionally to you.

Purva Bhadrapada.description: Generous, warm, flamboyant. Keep you in luxury. Detached side - need to do things alone. Don't let jealousy spoil.

Uttara Bhadrapada.description: Love dependability. They nurture and support. Secret sensuality behind cool persona. Usually won't risk alienating them.

Revati.description: Fall for idealism but hard to live up to image. They don't want sensuality, you want luxury. Descends into mediocrity.

Ashwini.description: Mrigasira stimulates you. Passionate and fiery love. Their possessiveness can make you uncomfortable.

Bharani.description: Instant attraction, hot and fiery passion can propel you into an affair. The fire can burn out too quickly.

Krittika.description: Intellectual connection strong. Passion may be lacking. Need to work on emotional intimacy.

Rohini.description: Good friendship and exciting sex. Want same things. Introduce Mrigasira to sensuality. Emotionally complete.

Mrigashirsha.description: Similar natures. Both restless and seeking. Good intellectual match but may lack emotional depth.

Ardra.description: Excellent match. Both ruled by Mars/Rahu energy. Dynamic and exciting. Strong mental connection.

Punarvasu.description: Jupiter influence brings wisdom. May feel too philosophical at times.

Pushya.description: Saturn brings stability to restless nature. Good balance between adventure and security.

Ashlesha.description: Mercury connection but different expressions. Can be challenging emotionally.

Magha.description: Intellectual repartee and casual flirtation. Pleasantly surprised by sensuality. Jealous and want commitment.

Purva Phalguni.description: Venusian charm attracts. Fun and light but need deeper connection.

Uttara Phalguni.description: Good balance. Sun energy provides direction to restless nature.

Vishakha.description: Jupiter expansion meets Mars drive. Can be overwhelming.

Vishakha.description: Jupiter expansion with Rahu intensity. Can be overwhelming.

Anuradha.description: Attraction is fearful fascination. Inability to combine sex with words of love makes you feel unloved.

Jyeshta.description: Bring worst out in each other. Dominant and aggressive thinking can deal with aftermath. Can press self-destruct.

Mula.description: Ketu-Rahu axis. Spiritual connection. Intense but transformative.

Purva Ashadha.description: Venus brings creativity. Good balance to intensity.

Uttara Ashadha.description: Sun provides direction. Helps focus energy.

Jyeshta.description: Attraction on surface. Not into complicated relationships but you enjoy them. Try to control, they may leave.

Purva Ashadha.description: Venus and Jupiter harmonious. Creative and expansive.

Uttara Ashadha.description: Sun and Jupiter work well. Strong values and direction.

Hasta.description: Psychological inability to connect. Past life connections in negative way. Appreciate good qualities.

Dhanishta.description: Must overcome complex about animal sign. Lioness too powerful for rat. Pay back laziness by looking at others.

Shatabhisha.description: Deep and intense relationships. Endeavor to fulfill needs. Let you into innermost secrets. Open hearts.

Purva Bhadrapada.description: Don't allow them to put you on pedestal. One moment of glory creates problems. Feel inadequate, make them unwanted.

Uttara Bhadrapada.description: Too restricted about sex while you want freedom. Quietly sensuous behind cool exterior. Delighted by discovery.

Shravana.description: Moon connection! Best match. Both lunar and nurturing.

Ashwini.description: Never able to give full attention. Passion can be good but love may not stand test of time. Battlefield relationship.

Bharani.description: A difficult partnership. Chitra is exotic, adventurous, and sensuous. This can lead to an exciting experience.

Krittika.description: Mars energy can clash. Passion present but conflicts arise. Need compromise.

Rohini.description: Attracted to dynamic, confident, passionate Chitra. Let them dominate but discover implacability and selfishness.

Mrigashirsha.description: Both Mars-ruled can clash. Too similar in independence. Competition rather than partnership.

Ardra.description: Mars energy adds passion. Dynamic but needs management.

Punarvasu.description: Mars energy can be too aggressive. Need patience.

Pushya.description: Mars too aggressive for Saturn. Conflicts.

Ashlesha.description: Mars-Mercury dynamic. Passionate and intelligent.

Magha.description: Very sensual, match endless demands. May feel intimidated sexually. Fight for supremacy. Be democratic.

Purva Phalguni.description: Mars-Venus passion. Dynamic and exciting.

Uttara Phalguni.description: Mars-Sun. Passion with strength.

Hasta.description: Moon-Mars-Venus. Emotional, passionate, sensual. Excellent match.

Chitra.description: Similar natures. Both dynamic and creative. Need to avoid competition.

Anuradha.description: Tough, challenging and frustrating. Challenge at every step. Lessons are complex. Usually don't give up easily but this is hard.

Jyeshta.description: Instant dislike and argue incessantly but strong underlying attraction. Agree to disagree. Unresolved spiritual issues.

Dhanishta.description: Mars connection! Both dynamic and passionate.

Ashwini.description: Not sexy at first but mentally stimulating. Fulfill your other dreams. Pay attention to sexual intimacy.

Bharani.description: Swati are charmers. You love their verve, energy, and the interesting way they flirt with you.

Krittika.description: Rahu influence creates uncertainty. Unconventional but challenging.

Rohini.description: Spiritually complex. Irrational mistrust. Moon frightened of Rahu. Fear interpreted as lack of trust.

Mrigashirsha.description: Rahu creates complexity. Unconventional but unstable.

Ardra.description: Rahu connection! Both ruled by Rahu. Understand each other's complexity. Intense and transformative.

Punarvasu.description: Rahu creates unpredictability. Unstable.

Pushya.description: Rahu and Saturn complex. Karmic challenges.

Ashlesha.description: Rahu-Mercury. Unconventional and intellectual.

Magha.description: Feel uneasy. Stressful karmic bond brings unhappiness before true happiness. Work through fears and inadequacies.

Purva Phalguni.description: Rahu-Venus unconventional. Exciting but unpredictable.

Uttara Phalguni.description: Rahu-Sun challenging. Unconventional and difficult.

Hasta.description: Moon-Rahu. Emotional but unconventional.

Chitra.description: Mars-Rahu. Passionate and unconventional.

Swati.description: Similar natures. Both unconventional and independent.

Anuradha.description: Pragmatists, never become what you desire. Don't expect all fantasies to become reality. Love them for what they are.

Jyeshta.description: Way with words exhilarating. Ambitions take precedence. If play mind games, they give as good as they get.

Shatabhisha.description: Rahu connection! Best match. Both unconventional and intense.

Ashwini.description: Sensuous and passionate but lack of sensitivity. Restlessness undermines confidence. Commitment issues.

Bharani.description: The sexual excitement that brought you together cannot be sustained at the high note on which it started.

Krittika.description: Jupiter brings wisdom but can be overwhelming. Need balance in relationship.

Rohini.description: Unable to understand inner needs. Happy as long as you play by their rules. Unrealistic expectations.

Mrigashirsha.description: Jupiter expansion meets Mars drive. Can be overwhelming.

Ardra.description: Jupiter expansion with Rahu intensity. Can be overwhelming.

Punarvasu.description: Jupiter connection! Both expansive and philosophical. Excellent spiritual partnership.

Pushya.description: Jupiter and Saturn - wisdom and discipline. Good for growth.

Ashlesha.description: Jupiter-Mercury. Wisdom with intelligence.

Magha.description: On defensive, need to prove power. Way of dealing is rejection. Stop feeling intimidated and connect sexually.

Purva Phalguni.description: Jupiter-Venus. Wisdom with pleasure.

Uttara Phalguni.description: Jupiter-Sun. Wisdom with strength.

Hasta.description: Moon-Jupiter. Emotional and wise.

Chitra.description: Mars-Jupiter. Passion with wisdom.

Vishakha.description: Similar natures. Both expansive and goal-oriented.

Anuradha.description: Meeting of opposing forces. Cautious vs expansive. Splendid partnership. Love should be free and giving.

Jyeshta.description: Love, sex, desire, philosophy, mysticism - all interest you both. Enjoy sensuality but know when to control senses.

Purva Bhadrapada.description: Jupiter connection! Best match. Both wise and expansive.

Ashwini.description: Good partners if you don't cling too much. They need freedom. Passionate and carefree, different from you.

Bharani.description: Spiritually complex. They want sex, you want love. Mistake one for other. Feel insecure and restless.

Krittika.description: Powerful and dynamic, strong pull. Strong and silent type. Envelop you in warmth.

Rohini.description: Aspire to divine love and self-realization. Both fulfill need for romance and sublime love. Passionate brings out best.

Mrigashirsha.description: Frustrating relationship. Refuse to accept love without questioning. Put up defenses fast.

Ardra.description: Attraction is fearful fascination. Inability to combine sex with words of love makes you feel unloved.

Punarvasu.description: Enjoy ability to be everywhere. Happy to wait. Expand horizons and give stability by loving selflessly.

Pushya.description: Saturn rules both. Inflexible about divine love. Afraid to be enveloped by emotions. Teach them about love.

Ashlesha.description: Hate complications. Shy away from passion and complex emotions. Your lifeblood is love. Keep relationship simple.

Magha.description: Can challenge autocratic behavior, invigorating. Opposite in every way but powerful attraction. They love completely.

Purva Phalguni.description: Fun, social, witty, charming. Main challenge is expectations. They want you social, you want focus on needs.

Uttara Phalguni.description: Different priorities but make something beautiful. Returns love completely. Support dreams. Not talkative but confident in love.

Hasta.description: Good partner - attractive, sophisticated, emotional and intuitive. Both practical and ambitious. Unconditional love.

Chitra.description: Tough, challenging and frustrating. Challenge at every step. Lessons are complex. Usually don't give up easily but this is hard.

Swati.description: Pragmatists, never become what you desire. Don't expect all fantasies to become reality. Love them for what they are.

Vishakha.description: Meeting of opposing forces. Cautious vs expansive. Splendid partnership. Love should be free and giving.

Anuradha.description: Both want same things. No words necessary - when you meet they know what you desire. Sex wonderful, love divine.

Jyeshta.description: Best partner! Sexy, passionate, sensual. Fulfill all desires for love and emotional satisfaction. Patient and loving.

Mula.description: Can destroy illusions. Think they offer true love but unable to fulfill. Mula aggressive to deer. Dump anger on you.

Purva Ashadha.description: Fall for charm and creativity but falling for image. Realistic and develop friendship first. Need to be free.

Uttara Ashadha.description: Love them more than they do you. Sense loneliness and need for love. Wish they were more demonstrative.

Shravana.description: Love lunar radiance. Endeavor to find realization. Meld on spiritual, emotional and physical levels. Feed your love.

Dhanishta.description: Admire courage. Fall in musth - divine ecstasy living in imaginary world. May not deal with needs sensitively.

Shatabhisha.description: Elusive, never there when wanted. Making promises not always kept. Encourage to talk about love. Be realistic.

Purva Bhadrapada.description: Fall for generous and warm. Very different, confident and strong. Let you be in charge. Friends say it weighs too heavily.

Uttara Bhadrapada.description: Hide emotional needs behind practicality. Bonds not those on which relationship develops initially. Hard to give up on their love.

Revati.description: Make you feel whole. No longer live in polarities. Divine love you were seeking. Cocoon of love and happiness.

Ashwini.description: Spiritually complex. Cavalier attitude to passions. Express negatively - loving, leaving, emotionally messing about.

Bharani.description: Excessive sensuality trying to fulfill desires. Hypnotized by allure but feel guilty ignoring spirituality.

Krittika.description: Invigorated by warmth and straightforward approach. Strong so cannot manipulate. Feel secure and loved.

Rohini.description: Stretches mentally and emotionally. Exciting, romantic, sensuous. Satisfy love for luxury. May become too tied to desires.

Mrigashirsha.description: Constantly challenge and they rise to provocation. Find criticism irritating. Get along in practical areas.

Ardra.description: Bring worst out in each other. Dominant and aggressive thinking can deal with aftermath. Can press self-destruct.

Punarvasu.description: Attraction on surface. Not into complicated relationships but you enjoy them. Try to control, they may leave.

Pushya.description: Too disciplined and rigid. Not into mind games, appear ascetic. Surprisingly good lovers behind coldness.

Ashlesha.description: Learn to look beyond intellectual restrictions. Understand each other's life path. Take risk with you.

Magha.description: Best partner! Everything you want: confident, dynamic, sexy, passionate, soulful and loving. Warmth brings security.

Purva Phalguni.description: Endeavor to satisfy senses. Creative, sophisticated, exciting. Sexual life full, social life entertaining.

Uttara Phalguni.description: Stop playing mind games. Make emotionally unsettled by loving passionately then transferring interests.

Hasta.description: Fascinated by sophistication but react to buffalo animal sign - rough and ugly. Too critical reinforcing poor self-image.

Chitra.description: Instant dislike and argue incessantly but strong underlying attraction. Agree to disagree. Unresolved spiritual issues.

Swati.description: Way with words exhilarating. Ambitions take precedence. If play mind games, they give as good as they get.

Vishakha.description: Love, sex, desire, philosophy, mysticism - all interest you both. Enjoy sensuality but know when to control senses.

Anuradha.description: Love you unconditionally, flourish under love. Best lovers and friends. Supportive when exploring spiritual self.

Jyeshta.description: Same junction of life, subtle understanding. In Vedic tradition two Jyeshtas should not marry - create painful turmoil.

Mula.description: Teach about rejection and love. Usually want to be in charge. When tables turned, creates emotional distress.

Purva Ashadha.description: Flexibility hard to handle. Want concentration on you but outside interests interfere. Paths may be different.

Uttara Ashadha.description: Spiritual side relates to austere coolness but sensuous side unfulfilled. Need to teach intimacy.

Shravana.description: Appear like you thinking and philosophizing. Important difference - you think, they feel. Get very emotional.

Dhanishta.description: Admire courage and forbearance. Strong and loving relationship. Bask in warmth. Learn to face harsh realities.

Shatabhisha.description: As they control inner demons, may not stand by. Understand spiritual struggle more than they do.

Uttara Bhadrapada.description: Teach about discipline. Bonds not on which relationship develops initially. Can learn from ascetic nature.

Revati.description: Similar but different agendas. Explore sensuality vs love. Tendency to be supercritical. Blame each other.

Ashwini.description: Lots in common - adventurous and fun. Share ruler Ketu. But spiritually you don't bond. Past becomes a demon.

Bharani.description: You are attracted by their unconventional, daring lifestyle. You use all your wiles and sexual experience to get them interested.

Krittika.description: Ketu influence creates spiritual complexity. May lack practical grounding.

metadata.methodology: Based on detailed nakshatra characteristics from aaps.space including lord, deity, yoni, gana, nadi, and psychological profiles

score_interpretation.80-89: Very Good - Strong compatibility with minor adjustments
